name: [Scaled and Icy] Trash | You Ventured Too Far
description:
Among the land of Trench, you stumble across a cave. A bright blue dragon is ontop of this cave, their breath already exhaling soft yellow smoke. You ventured too far, and now you're caught by a dragon. What are you going to do now?
——•——•——•——•——•——
Read this carrd for any information for our bots: https://trenchedbots.carrd.co/
This bot relies on adventure and fun. There could be angst along the way.

-Meant for angsty-fun.
-No trigger warnings
-You may need a jailbreak if you're going to involve gore and npcs.
